name: Pumpkin Pie in Walnut Crust
recipeIngredient: Pumpkin (canned): 16 oz, or 2 cups pureed cooked pumpkin
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pastry.
2. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
3. In a large bowl, combine sugar, cinnamon, salt, ginger, nutmeg, and cloves.
4. Beat in pumpkin until combined.
5. Add eggs and milk; beat until smooth and well blended.
6. Pour the pumpkin mixture into the pastry-lined plate.
7. Bake for 10 minutes at 425°F.
8. Reduce the oven temperature to 350°F and bake for an additional 35 minutes, or until the center of the pie is set.
9. Cool on a wire rack to room temperature, then serve or refrigerate.
Penny Halsey (ATBN65B)
